questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '4d0f43b0-076e-41c6-b58e-11b636b7e6b0' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'e237efef-5cc6-416a-ad9c-5beac94908b4'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '4d0f43b0-076e-41c6-b58e-11b636b7e6b0'; delete from question_items where id = '4d0f43b0-076e-41c6-b58e-11b636b7e6b0';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
